instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें।

questions.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
alternatives: I will have finished the report by tomorrow.
questions.hint: By + time, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, वह अपनी MBA पूरी कर चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By next year, she will have completed her MBA.
alternatives: She will have completed her MBA by next year.
questions.hint: By + time, she + will have + V3
questions.explanation: All subjects use 'will have', no he/she distinction।

questions.hindi: 5 बजे तक, हम office से निकल चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By 5 PM, we will have left the office.
alternatives: We will have left the office by 5 PM.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: 2030 तक, technology बहुत बदल चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By 2030, technology will have changed a lot.
alternatives: Technology will have changed a lot by 2030.
questions.hint: By + year, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: जब तक तुम यह पढ़ोगे, मैं जा चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By the time you read this, I will have left.
alternatives: I will have left by the time you read this.
questions.hint: By the time + clause, subject + will have + V3
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, वे नए घर में जा चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By next week, they will have moved to a new house.
alternatives: They will have moved to a new house by next week.
questions.hint: By + time, they + will have + V3
questions.explanation: Personal life event with Future Perfect।

questions.hindi: deadline से पहले, मैंने form submit कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: Before the deadline, I will have submitted the form.
alternatives: I will have submitted the form before the deadline.
questions.hint: Before + noun, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: मैं तब तक खत्म नहीं कर पाऊँगा।
questions.english: I won't have finished by then.
alternatives: I will not have finished by then.
questions.hint: won't have + V3

questions.hindi: क्या तुम Friday तक assignment पूरा कर लोगे?
questions.english: Will you have completed the assignment by Friday?
alternatives: Will you have finished the assignment by Friday?
questions.hint: Will + subject + have + V3?

questions.hindi: क्या वह meeting शुरू होने से पहले पहुँच जाएगी?
questions.english: Will she have arrived before the meeting starts?
alternatives: Will she have reached before the meeting begins?
questions.hint: Will + she + have + V3 + before + clause?

questions.hindi: Friday तक, मैं testing phase पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.
alternatives: I will have completed the testing phase by Friday.
questions.hint: By + day, subject + will have + V3 + noun

questions.hindi: हमारी next meeting तक, हम design finalize कर चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By our next meeting, we will have finalized the design.
alternatives: We will have finalized the design by our next meeting.
questions.hint: By + noun, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: December तक, मैं अपनी trip के लिए पर्याप्त पैसे बचा चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By December, I will have saved enough for my trip.
alternatives: I will have saved enough money for my trip by December.
questions.hint: By + month, subject + will have + V3 + enough
questions.grammarRule: By + [month] + subject + will have + V3 + enough

questions.hindi: June तक, मैं अपना course पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By June, I will have completed my course.
alternatives: I will have finished my course by June.
questions.hint: By + month, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: 5 सालों में, मैं senior manager बन चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: In 5 years, I will have become a senior manager.
alternatives: I will have become a senior manager in 5 years.
questions.hint: In + time period, subject + will have + V3
questions.explanation: 'In' + time period भी Future Perfect के साथ आता है।
questions.grammarRule: In + [time period] + subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: Q4 तक, हमारी company अपना revenue target पूरा कर चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By Q4, our company will have reached its revenue target.
alternatives: Our company will have reached its revenue target by Q4.
questions.hint: By + quarter, company + will have + V3

questions.hindi: March तक, नए office का निर्माण हो चुका होगा।
questions.english: By March, the new office will have been built.
alternatives: The new office will have been built by March.
questions.hint: By + month, subject + will have been + V3 (passive)
questions.explanation: Passive Future Perfect: will have been + V3।
questions.grammarRule: By + [time] + subject + will have been + V3

questions.hindi: मैं deadline से पहले proposal भेज चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: I will have sent the proposal before the deadline.
alternatives: I will have submitted the proposal before the deadline.
questions.hint: Before + noun, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: 2040 तक, electric vehicles ने petrol cars को बदल दिया होगा।
questions.english: By 2040, electric vehicles will have replaced petrol cars.
alternatives: Electric vehicles will have replaced petrol cars by 2040.
questions.hint: By + year, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: जब तक boss आएगा, सब काम हो चुका होगा।
questions.english: By the time the boss arrives, all the work will have been done.
alternatives: All the work will have been done by the time the boss arrives.
questions.hint: By the time + clause, subject + will have been + V3
questions.explanation: Sequence of future events with passive।
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + subject + will have been + V3

questions.hindi: मैं कभी विदेश नहीं गया होऊँगा अगर मैं यह नहीं करूँ।
questions.english: I will not have gone abroad if I don't do this.
alternatives: I won't have traveled abroad if I don't take this step.
questions.hint: Subject + will not have + V3 + if clause
questions.grammarRule: Subject + will not have + V3 + if + [clause]

questions.hindi: By Friday, हमने testing phase पूरा कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By Friday, we will have completed the testing phase.
alternatives: We will have finished the testing phase by Friday.
questions.hint: By + day, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: By the time you read this email, मैंने bug fix कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: By the time you read this email, I will have already fixed the bug.
alternatives: I will have fixed the bug by the time you read this email.
questions.hint: By the time + clause, subject + will have already + V3
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + subject + will have already + V3

questions.hindi: Day 75 तक, तुमने English में mastery हासिल कर ली होगी।
questions.english: By Day 75, you will have mastered English.
alternatives: You will have gained mastery over English by Day 75.
questions.hint: By + noun, you + will have + V3

questions.hindi: June तक, मैं Python में proficient बन चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By June, I will have become proficient in Python.
alternatives: I will have gained proficiency in Python by June.
questions.hint: By + month, subject + will have + V3 + in + skill
questions.grammarRule: By + [month] + subject + will have + V3 + in + [skill]

questions.hindi: अगले महीने तक, हमने systems upgrade कर लिए होंगे।
questions.english: By next month, we will have upgraded our systems.
alternatives: We will have upgraded our systems by next month.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: शुक्रवार तक, हमने बजट approve कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By Friday, the manager will have approved the budget.
alternatives: The budget will have been approved by Friday.
questions.hint: By + day, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: Monday तक, developers ने update deploy कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: By Monday, the developers will have deployed the update.
alternatives: The update will have been deployed by Monday.
questions.hint: By + day, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: साल के अंत तक, हमने sales target पार कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By year-end, we will have exceeded our sales target.
alternatives: We will have surpassed our sales target by year-end.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, हमने product deliver कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: We will have delivered the product by next week.
alternatives: By next week, we will have delivered the product.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: शाम तक, हमने negotiations conclude कर लिए होंगे।
questions.english: By evening, we will have concluded the negotiations.
alternatives: We will have finished the negotiations by evening.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: 60 की उम्र तक, वह retire हो चुका होगा।
questions.english: By 60, he will have retired from his job.
alternatives: He will have retired by the age of 60.
questions.hint: By + age, he + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, हम अपने नए घर में settle हो चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By next year, we will have settled in our new home.
alternatives: We will have moved into our new home by next year.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: noon तक, मैं email draft कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: I will have drafted the email by noon.
alternatives: By noon, I will have drafted the email.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: कल तक, हमने contract review कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: We will have reviewed the contract by tomorrow.
alternatives: By tomorrow, we will have gone through the contract.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: अगले quarter तक, हमने नई strategy बना ली होगी।
questions.english: We will have developed a new strategy by next quarter.
alternatives: By next quarter, we will have created a new strategy.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: महीने के अंत तक, हमने outcome measure कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: We will have measured the outcome by end of month.
alternatives: By end of month, we will have assessed the outcome.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: 2028 तक, हमने एक नया industry benchmark set कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: We will have set a new industry benchmark by 2028.
alternatives: By 2028, we will have established a new industry benchmark.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + year

questions.hindi: अगले महीने तक, मुझे promotion मिल चुकी होगी।
questions.english: In five years, I will have earned a promotion.
alternatives: I will have gotten a promotion in five years.
questions.hint: In + time period, subject + will have + V3
questions.grammarRule: In + [time period] + subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: 2030 तक, हमने 10 देशों में विस्तार कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By 2030, we will have expanded to 10 countries.
alternatives: We will have grown into 10 countries by 2030.
questions.hint: By + year, subject + will have + V3 + to + noun
questions.grammarRule: By + [year] + subject + will have + V3 + to + [noun]

questions.hindi: अंततः, मैं अपना goal achieve कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: Eventually, I will have achieved my goal.
alternatives: I will have reached my goal eventually.
questions.hint: Eventually, subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: तब तक demand बढ़ चुकी होगी।
questions.english: We foresee that demand will have increased by then.
alternatives: Demand will have risen by then, we foresee.
questions.hint: Subject + foresee that + subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: By March, हमने funding secure कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By March, we will have secured funding.
alternatives: We will have obtained funding by March.
questions.hint: By + month, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: By June, हमने product launch कर दिया होगा।
questions.english: By June, we will have launched the new product.
alternatives: We will have released the new product by June.
questions.hint: By + month, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, हमने पहला milestone हासिल कर लिया होगा।
questions.english: By next week, we will have reached the first milestone.
alternatives: We will have hit the first milestone by next week.
questions.hint: By + time, we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: By the time you arrive, मैं सब तैयार कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By the time you arrive, I will have prepared everything.
alternatives: I will have gotten everything ready by the time you arrive.
questions.hint: By the time + clause, subject + will have + V3
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, revenue double हो चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By next year, revenue will have doubled.
alternatives: Revenue will have grown twice by next year.
questions.hint: By + time, revenue + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले महीने तक, हमने नई policy लागू कर दी होगी।
questions.english: We will have implemented the new policy by next month.
alternatives: By next month, we will have put the new policy into action.
questions.hint: Subject + will have + V3 + by + time

questions.hindi: क्या तुमने Friday तक report भेज दी होगी?
questions.english: Will you have sent the report by Friday?
alternatives: Will you have submitted the report by Friday?
questions.hint: Will + you + have + V3 + by + time?

questions.hindi: क्या company ने Q4 तक target पूरा कर लिया होगा?
questions.english: Will the company have reached its target by Q4?
alternatives: Will the company have achieved its target by Q4?
questions.hint: Will + subject + have + V3 + by + time?
